articles.title: JetBlue is cutting a route between Boston and this southern city
articles.description:
Impacted customers will receive a full refund.

The post JetBlue is cutting a route between Boston and this southern city appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: JetBlue is discontinuing its Boston to New Orleans route effective immediately.
Affected customers will receive full refunds for their tickets.
This change may limit travel options for Boston residents heading to New Orleans.

articles.title: Theater review: ‘Stereophonic’ at Emerson Colonial really makes you feel like you’re with the band
articles.description:
Daniel Aukin's incredibly immersive production does an uncanny job of capturing the artistic experience.

The post Theater review: ‘Stereophonic’ at Emerson Colonial really makes you feel like you’re with the band appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Daniel Aukin's production of 'Stereophonic' immerses audiences in a unique artistic experience.
The show is currently running at the Emerson Colonial Theatre in Boston.
Local residents can enjoy a fresh take on theater that enhances community engagement.

articles.title: Joe Mazzulla referenced his high school principal while defending Jaylen Brown after ejection
articles.description:
"He was a hell of a principal."

The post Joe Mazzulla referenced his high school principal while defending Jaylen Brown after ejection appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Joe Mazzulla defended Jaylen Brown following his ejection during a recent game.
Mazzulla referenced his high school principal to highlight Brown's character.
This incident may influence fan perceptions of Brown's role in the Celtics.

articles.title: ‘No Kings’ protest movement announces March rally on Boston Common
articles.description:
The next “No Kings” rally, aimed at opposing authoritarianism and promoting democratic reforms, will take place Saturday, March 28.

The post ‘No Kings’ protest movement announces March rally on Boston Common appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ‘No Kings’ rally scheduled for Saturday, March 28, on Boston Common.
Protest aims to oppose authoritarianism and promote democratic reforms.
Local residents encouraged to participate in advocating for democratic values.
